_description: Chrome / Edge Enterprise Policy — Force-install AIGO-X Browser Agent so users cannot disable or remove it.
_deploy_chrome: Upload to Google Workspace Admin Console → Devices → Chrome → Apps & Extensions → Force Install
_deploy_edge: Upload to Microsoft Intune → Apps → Browser extensions → Add. Or via Edge Management Service.
_deploy_admx: Windows GPO: Computer Configuration → Administrative Templates → Google Chrome → Extensions → Configure the list of force-installed apps

__EXTENSION_ID__._note_managed_storage: Pre-configure extension via managed storage (below) to auto-enroll without user interaction

_managed_storage_schema: Create a file at: /etc/opt/chrome/policies/managed/aigo-x-agent.json (Linux/Mac) or HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Google\Chrome\3rdparty\extensions\<EXT_ID>\policy (Windows Registry)
_powershell_snippet:
# Windows PowerShell — Deploy Chrome policy via registry
$path = 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Google\Chrome\ExtensionInstallForcelist'
If (!(Test-Path $path)) { New-Item -Path $path -Force }
Set-ItemProperty -Path $path -Name 1 -Value '__EXT_ID__;https://clients2.google.com/service/update2/crx'
